/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/HelloIluminacao.dir/src/HelloIluminacao.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HelloIluminacao.dir/common/glad.c.o -o HelloIluminacao  _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation
